author: barnabasbusa
content:
Hi <@467031582146822144>, 

So we don't really like to talk about potential timelines for future forks, as there are too many unknowns. 

We are aiming for generally a 2w devnet lifecycle. This sometimes slides into a 3w cycle. 

We are currently still on a split EL/CL headliner devnet cycle, so we are going to first have to merge these in order to have any kinda estimates for forking testnets. 

We usually do about 5-6 devnets per EL/CL headliner devnet, then about 3-5 merged headliners devnet, then start to schedule testnets. 

We are currently on epbs-devnet-0 and bal-devnet-2, so still quite a long way out I'd say from needing to worry about forking sepolia.

author: joshklop
content: Thanks Barnabas. On our end, we usually need to begin preparing for L1 hardforks about 2-3+ months out at least, so if Sepolia isn't hardforking until at least mid June, then we should be alright for now.
